examples: I've attended research conferences where a scientist has been asked what he thinks about the advisability of continuing a certain experiment.
I have doubts about the advisability of surgery in this case.
Use smooth, uninterrupted presswork digitize working flow is advisability to lift.
For sometime though the Asean countries have been split on the advisability of closer ties with India.
Bronfman claims that Messier told him to study the advisability of investing in EchoStar, a satellite-TV service.
